verdict.rationale: The Q2 2026 management commentary — the only vault source for the net promoter score — states the group-wide NPS was 38 for the quarter, contradicting the claim's value of 44; 44 matches no NPS value in any period on record.
verdict.suggested_action: Reconcile the master document's NPS of 44 against the Q2 2026 management commentary figure of 38; determine whether the master figure is a transcription error or sourced from a different NPS measurement.

Q2 2026 Management Commentary
Letter to the supervisory board
Trading in Q2 2026 developed in line with the restated plan. Net revenue reached EUR 21.89 million, with the gross
result at EUR 13.03 million and an adjusted operating result of EUR 5.75 million.
Customer sentiment strengthened again: the group-wide net promoter score came in at 38 for the quarter, and the
gross renewal rate held at 91.4% across the installed base.
Delivery efficiency improved. The median onboarding cycle for new enterprise customers was 27 days, and the
certified implementation partner network grew to 80 partners at quarter end.
The workforce closed at 224 full-time equivalents, supported by 26 external contract staff.

final_text:
The Q2 2026 management commentary — the only vault source for the net promoter score — states the group-wide NPS "came in at 38 for the quarter," not 44. NPS appears only in commentary prose (no table facts exist for it), and 44 matches no quarter's value across the series (55, 41, 49, 57, 38).
